title: hazardous_material_spill
description: A corrosive chemical spill in a lab corridor escalates over time.

timeline.title: Spill Detection
timeline.description: Small chemical puddle observed in lab corridor. Identify substance and restrict access.

timeline.title: Area Evacuation
timeline.description: Fumes detected causing respiratory irritation. Evacuate immediate area and seal doors.

timeline.title: Ventilation Shutdown
timeline.description: Spill spreading to hallway. Shut down HVAC to prevent contamination spread. Alert hazmat team.

timeline.title: Hazmat Team Notification
timeline.description: Specialized hazmat team dispatched, ETA 15 minutes. Provide chemical safety data sheets.

timeline.title: Containment Operations
timeline.description: Hazmat team on-site beginning containment. Spill neutralized and contained with absorbent barriers.

timeline.title: Decontamination and Cleanup
timeline.description: Area decontaminated and cleared. Resume normal ventilation and conduct air quality testing.

node-1.title: Chemical Spill Discovered
node-1.situation: A small chemical puddle has been observed in the lab corridor. The substance is unknown and the area is unoccupied for now.
node-1.question: What is your first action?

options.label: A
options.text: Restrict access to the corridor and check the lab's chemical inventory to identify the substance.

options.label: B
options.text: Immediately start cleaning the spill with available mops and supplies.

options.label: C
options.text: Report it to maintenance and leave it for them to handle.

node-2.title: Fumes Detected
node-2.situation: Staff near the corridor report respiratory irritation. The spill appears to be a corrosive chemical that is releasing toxic fumes.
node-2.question: How do you respond?

options.label: A
options.text: Immediately evacuate all nearby personnel and seal the corridor doors to contain the fumes.

options.label: B
options.text: Open windows to ventilate the area and have staff continue working at a distance.

node-3.title: Spill Spreading
node-3.situation: The spill is spreading into the hallway. The HVAC system is still running and could spread contaminated air throughout the building.
node-3.question: What action do you take?

options.label: A
options.text: Shut down the HVAC system immediately and call the hazmat response team.

options.label: B
options.text: Leave the HVAC running to help clear the fumes faster.

node-4.title: Hazmat Team Arrives
node-4.situation: The hazmat response team has arrived on site. They need information to begin safe containment operations.
node-4.question: How do you assist the hazmat team?

options.label: A
options.text: Provide the chemical safety data sheets and give the team a layout of the affected area.

options.label: B
options.text: Begin cleanup operations alongside the hazmat team without waiting for their instructions.

node-5.title: Scenario Complete
node-5.situation: The hazmat team has successfully contained and neutralized the spill. The area has been decontaminated and air quality testing shows safe levels.
node-5.question: Scenario complete. Well done!
